name: @stackra/testing
purpose: Shared Vitest preset, setup lifecycle, and assertable primitives — SWC-based transform with full decorator metadata support.
capabilities: SWC + unplugin-swc transform for decorator metadata
Consumed by every workspace package's vitest.config.ts
when_to_use: Every workspace package's vitest.config.ts merges @stackra/testing/preset for consistent test transforms.
when_not_to_use: For runtime testing hooks use the per-package /testing subpath; for e2e use Playwright directly.
